subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Call thou to mind those days when thou wert in the presence of the Countenance and didst hearken unto the Call of God, the King, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی ان اذکر الایام التی کنت لدی الوجه و سمعت ندآء الله الملک العلیم
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Word of God is its own standard, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @predictions and prophecies, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
